jobs.prompt: Audit the target described by the workflow input through a correctness lens only: logic errors, edge cases, error propagation, state bugs. Inspect the worktree. Cite file/line per finding.

Audit the target described by the workflow input through a security lens only: injection, untrusted input, secrets, privilege boundaries, unsafe subprocess or file handling. Inspect the worktree. Cite file/line per finding.

Audit the target described by the workflow input through a maintainability lens only: overcomplication, dead code, duplicated logic, fragile coupling, missing tests. Inspect the worktree. Cite file/line per finding.

Adversarially verify every prior finding: try to refute each one against the actual code in the worktree. Default to rejecting a finding when the evidence is ambiguous. Output only findings that survive, with the evidence that confirms them, then list the rejected findings with one-line reasons.
